description_long: This is a dark brown leather top hat with a wide, gently sloping brim and a rounded, flat-topped crown. The surface of the hat is textured, resembling natural leather grain, giving it a slightly rugged and vintage appearance. The brim is broad and flat, extending outward evenly from the base of the crown, providing ample shade and a classic silhouette. The crown is cylindrical with a subtle curve at the top, maintaining a consistent height all around. There are no visible decorative elements, bands, or embellishments, making the design simple and understated. The hat appears sturdy and well-crafted, suitable for both functional and stylish urban wear.
description: A dark brown leather top hat with a wide, flat brim and a rounded, flat-topped crown, featuring a textured, rugged surface and no visible decorations.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the flat, rounded crown and the even, wide brim encircling the hat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical crown and the broad, flat brim extending outward.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view emphasizing the underside of the brim and the consistent crown shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the hat's profile and the smooth transition from crown to brim.
